creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Tian-Jian,

there hasn't been an update on your problem report for
net-p2p/py-bittorrent [1] for quite a while, and both Python and
BitTorrent have been updated in the meantime. Can you still reproduce the
problem with an up-to-date system, or can this PR be closed?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/101166
